sessions.intent: Carve plan for new code.run feature: Compiler/Runtime split + action handler + test plan handoff. Re-rooted from runtime2-cleanup onto its own branch off a9791ad5.

before.assumptions: code.run is a new PLang action that compiles a .cs file at runtime and invokes a method in it. App.Code (provider registry) stays untouched; new App.Compiler peer owns compile+cache. Roslyn already a transitive dep via Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Scripting 4.13.0 in PLang.csproj. The runtime2-cleanup branch already has the [Provider]→[Code] attribute rename (a9791ad5), which is why this branch bases there rather than on origin/runtime2 directly — the writing-modules doc references [Code].
before.risk: Sandboxing / signed-script trust is deferred to a separate pass and explicitly noted. Without it, code.run runs with the App's full trust — fine for trusted contexts, not for untrusted goal sources.

actions.context: New living doc: how to write a PLang module. There was no module-authoring doc when the session opened. Aligned with [Code] attribute (formerly [Provider]) per coder v29 rename. Live-additions tail logs two entries from this session (Path-as-string miss, ScriptEntry OBP smell).

Plan tree in canonical architect layout: spine + stages at the architect root, deep-dives under plan/. Three stages: Runtime leaf → Compiler with cache → action handler. Test strategy + coverage matrix + new-surfaces inventory for test-designer. Turn-by-turn design transcript (preserves the rejected paths and the why).

Coder file plan (NOT written this session — they are the deliverables for stages 1–3). Compiler/Runtime split is the OBP-correct shape after the design pivot in turn 9 of the transcript. App.Code is intentionally untouched.

after.status: plan delivered to test-designer and coder; pending implementation
after.health: green — branch self-contained, rooted off a9791ad5 so [Code] attribute and the runtime2-cleanup foundation are in place
after.notes: Two architect misses caught and logged as living-doc entries (Path-as-string miss, ScriptEntry OBP smell). Sandboxing/trust deferred to a separate design pass.
